obs.summary: > - [x] Task: tighten cron guardrails for lock busy retries.

notes: Blockquote + checkbox + bullet should not prevent task detection.
Unicode bullet should not prevent task detection.
Ordered list prefix should not prevent task detection.
Parenthesized numeric prefix should not prevent task detection.
Compact ordered dash prefix should not prevent task detection.
Bracket-wrapped marker should count as task-like.
Full-width marker + parentheses should count as task-like via NFKC.
Checkbox glyph [✓] + unicode bullet + bracket-wrapped marker.
Lenticular-bracket marker should count as task-like (aligned with triage marker support).
Black-square bullet prefix should count as task-like in heuristic-v1 and triage parity.

obs.summary: — TODO: tighten task marker parser coverage

notes: Em dash bullet should not prevent task detection.
Japanese middle-dot bullet + checkbox wrapper should still count as task-like.
White lenticular bracket marker should count as task-like (aligned with triage marker support).
CJK double-angle quote marker should count as task-like (aligned with triage marker support).
Full-width angle quote marker should count as task-like via NFKC width normalization (parity with triage marker coverage).
Checkbox glyph [☒] should be treated as task-like marker in heuristic-v1 and triage parity.
ASCII angle-bracket marker should count as task-like (shared parser path with full-width ＜TODO＞ via NFKC).
Checkbox glyph [✅] should be treated as task-like marker in heuristic-v1 (parity with triage marker support).
